meta.title: Air Force Basic Training - Testing - Week 6
meta.description:
Week 6 is a culmination of work that comes together and is tested during this week. The EOC / End of Course test takes place this week as does their final PT evaluation. 
Uniform and weapon checks as well as drill examinations take place this week to ensure the trainees are ready for graduation which is coming soon. Get training advice from former Drill Instructors and recruits delivered to your Sandboxx app every week. 

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
